title: This NEW NotebookLM Update Changes Everything
summary: Google's NotebookLM has been upgraded to function as a full AI agent capable of writing code, building sources, and delivering finished outputs autonomously. New features include a cloud computer for handling code and documents, auto-source building from initial ideas, and a Studio for generating podcasts and reports with cited answers.
writeup: The video covers a NotebookLM update that turns the tool into a full AI agent able to write code, build sources, and deliver finished outputs on its own. It matters because the upgrade moves NotebookLM past document summarizing toward autonomous task completion. Key takeaways: a cloud computer handles code and documents, auto-source building generates sources from an initial idea, and a Studio produces podcasts and reports with cited answers.
